summary: Comprehensive testing of Zitex P1 features completed: (1) Real-time WebSockets replacing polling for LiveMap and driver location pushes, (2) Multi-tenant payment gateways with Fernet-encrypted keys. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified Payment Gateways tab with 4 gateway cards and LiveMap tab with WebSocket connected status.
passed_tests: A. WebSocket client feed: connect → receive {type:hello}. Ping 'ping' → receive {type:pong}
A. WebSocket client feed: Invalid token → connection rejected with code 4401
B. WebSocket driver feed: connect → receive hello. Send location → client WS receives {type:location}
C. WebSocket broadcast on HTTP: client WS receives {type:order_created} after POST /public/{slug}/orders
D. WebSocket broadcast on driver HTTP location: client receives {type:location} when driver uses POST /driver/{slug}/location
E. Multi-tenant payment gateway catalog: GET /api/websites/payment-gateways/catalog returns 4 providers (moyasar, tabby, tamara, cod)
F. Client gateway list: GET /api/websites/client/payment-gateways returns all 4 with enabled/configured/test_mode fields
G. Save Moyasar keys: PUT /api/websites/client/payment-gateways/moyasar → configured=true and MASKED preview (never full plaintext secret)
H. Test creds Moyasar: POST .../moyasar/test with fake keys → {ok:false, message containing 401}
H. Test creds COD: POST .../cod/test → {ok:true}
I. Disable & delete: DELETE /api/websites/client/payment-gateways/moyasar → configured:false
J. Public gateway visibility: GET /api/websites/public/{slug}/payment-gateways returns ONLY enabled providers + publishable_key (no secret)
K. Payment init COD: POST /api/websites/public/{slug}/payments/init with provider:'cod' → {ok:true, provider:'cod', status:'pending', redirect_url:null}
L. Payment init Moyasar with fake keys: returns 502 with Moyasar 401 error (proves tenant keys are injected)
M. Payment init provider not enabled: returns 400
N. Payment init order belongs to another customer: returns 403
O. Payment init unknown provider: returns 400
P. Generated site renders checkout with dynamic payment dropdown: HTML contains checkout markers
Q. Frontend: Client Dashboard → Payment tab renders PaymentGatewaysTab with 4 gateway cards (moyasar, cod, tabby, tamara)
Q. Frontend: LiveMap tab shows 'مباشر (WebSocket)' green badge when connected
seed_data_creation: Test orders created during payment init tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two P1 features fully tested: (1) WebSockets - client and driver WS endpoints at /api/websites/ws/client/{slug}?token=<ClientToken> and /api/websites/ws/driver/{slug}?token=<DriverToken>. Client receives hello, pong, location, order_created, order_status events. Driver can push location via WS JSON {type:location, lat, lng}. (2) Multi-tenant Payment Gateways - 4 providers (moyasar, tabby, tamara, cod). Keys encrypted with Fernet. Client dashboard has PaymentGatewaysTab with data-testid='gateway-{provider}'. Public checkout uses /payments/init endpoint. Moyasar tested with fake keys returns 502 (proves real API call with tenant keys). COD works without keys.

websocket_client.broadcasts: Working - receives order_created, order_status, location events

websocket_driver.location_push: Working - send {type:location, lat, lng} → broadcasts to clients

payment_gateways.catalog: Working - returns 4 providers (moyasar, tabby, tamara, cod)
payment_gateways.test_credentials: Working - Moyasar fake keys return 401, COD returns ok:true
payment_gateways.public_visibility: Working - only enabled providers, no secrets exposed
payment_gateways.payment_init_moyasar: Working - fake keys return 502 (proves tenant keys injected)

frontend_payment_tab.tab_visible: Working - 💳 الدفع tab in Client Dashboard

frontend_livemap_tab.tab_visible: Working - خريطة حية tab in Client Dashboard

mocked_apis_list: Moyasar: tested with fake keys — real Moyasar API returns 401. When user plugs in real Moyasar sandbox keys the full flow should work end-to-end.
